import React from "react"; export default function Footer() { const socialLinks = { facebook: "https://www.facebook.com/share/1K1tDP2Vew/?mibextid=wwXIfr", instagram: "https://www.instagram.com/yassin_abdelkader/", youtube: "https://www.youtube.com/", github: "https://www.github.com/" }; const socialIcons = [ { name: "facebook", icon: "fab fa-facebook-f", color: "text-blue-600", hoverBg: "hover:bg-blue-600", hoverText: "hover:text-white", link: socialLinks.facebook, label: "Facebook" }, { name: "instagram", icon: "fab fa-instagram", color: "text-pink-600", hoverBg: "hover:bg-gradient-to-tr hover:from-yellow-400 hover:via-pink-500 hover:to-purple-600", hoverText: "hover:text-white", link: socialLinks.instagram, label: "Instagram" }, { name: "youtube", icon: "fab fa-youtube", color: "text-red-600", hoverBg: "hover:bg-red-600", hoverText: "hover:text-white", link: socialLinks.youtube, label: "YouTube" }, { name: "github", icon: "fab fa-github", color: "text-gray-900", hoverBg: "hover:bg-gray-900", hoverText: "hover:text-white", link: socialLinks.github, label: "GitHub" } ]; const footerLinks = [ { name: "À propos", href: "#about", icon: "fas fa-chevron-right" }, { name: "Blog", href: "#blog", icon: "fas fa-chevron-right" }, { name: "Services", href: "#services", icon: "fas fa-chevron-right" }, { name: "Projets", href: "#projects", icon: "fas fa-chevron-right" }, { name: "Contact", href: "#contact", icon: "fas fa-chevron-right" } ]; return ( <>
{/* SVG Wave Decoration */}
{/* Tout le contenu centré */}
{/* Liens utiles - format horizontal sur toute la largeur */}
Liens utiles
{footerLinks.map((link, index) => ( {link.name} ))}
{/* Séparateur principal */}
{/* Section des icônes sociales - sans noms */}

Restons en contact !

Retrouvez-nous sur ces plateformes

{/* Social Icons sans titres en dessous */}
{socialIcons.map((social) => ( ))}
{/* Séparateur */}
{/* Copyright Section */}
{new Date().getFullYear()} Tous droits réservés | Conçu avec par Yassin Abdelkader
{/* Add Font Awesome Icons */} ); }
